de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Class VariableNamer.IndProgramElementName

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.Name
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.ProgramElementName

  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Label, ModelElement, ProgramElement, MethodName, ReferenceSuffix, SourceElement, TerminalProgramElement, SVSubstitute, Comparable<Name>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    VariableNamer.PermIndProgramElementName, VariableNamer.TempIndProgramElementName
    Enclosing class:
    VariableNamer

    public abstract static class VariableNamer.IndProgramElementName
extends ProgramElementName
    ProgramElementName carrying an additional index
